input: HDFC BANK ALERT: Your KYC is pending verification. Update immediately to avoid account suspension within 24 hours. Click here: hdfc-kyc-update.secure-portal.in/verify?id=88421
notes: Unofficial domain, urgency, classic bank-KYC phishing pattern.

input: CONGRATULATIONS! Your mobile number has WON Rs. 25,00,000 in KBC Lucky Draw 2026 sponsored by Reliance Jio. To claim your prize, contact Mr. Ramesh Gupta on +91-98XXXXXX21 and pay registration fee of Rs. 4,999 via Google Pay. Offer valid for 24 hrs only.
notes: Unsolicited win, upfront fee to receive a prize.

input: Dear Customer, you are PRE-APPROVED for a personal loan of Rs 5,00,000 at 2% interest. No documents required. To process, pay refundable processing fee of Rs 3,500 via UPI to secure your loan disbursal today. Reply YES to proceed.

India Post: Your parcel (Tracking ID: IN7738201) is held at customs due to unpaid duty of Rs 1,850. Pay now to avoid return: indiapost-duty.release-parcel.com/pay Failure to pay within 6 hours will result in parcel destruction.
notes: Unofficial domain, small-amount urgency, invented penalty.

input: Dear Consumer, your electricity will be disconnected tonight at 9:30 PM due to unpaid bill. Contact our officer immediately on +91-9XXXXXXXXX or update your meter number here: bijli-quickpay.in to avoid disconnection.
notes: Same-day disconnection threat, personal contact instead of utility's official channel.

input: This is Priya calling from HDFC Bank Fraud Prevention Department. We've detected a suspicious transaction of Rs 45,000 on your card. To block this transaction immediately, please share the OTP you just received on your registered mobile number.
notes: OTP request — automatic hard flag regardless of other context.

input:
Subject: URGENT: Your SBI Account Will Be Suspended in 24 Hours
From: "SBI Security Team" <alert-security@sbi-verify-online.com>

Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected unusual activity on your State Bank of India account. Your account access will be permanently suspended within 24 hours unless you verify your identity immediately.

Click the secure link below to confirm your details:
[Verify My Account Now]

Failure to act will result in permanent account closure.

SBI Security Team

Subject: You Have Been Selected! Microsoft-Google Anniversary Lucky Draw Winner
From: "International Awards Committee" <claims@msoft-glucky-draws.org>

This is to officially inform you that your email address was selected as a winner of USD 850,000 in the Microsoft-Google Anniversary Promotion 2026. To process your winning claim, kindly contact our claims agent Mr. David Owen at claimsagent2026@gmail.com with your full name, address, and a copy of your ID for verification. A processing fee of USD 150 is required to release funds.
notes: Two unrelated companies co-sponsoring, fee-to-release-winnings, personal Gmail claims agent.

input: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi Yojana: Your next installment of Rs 2,000 is ready for release. To receive it in your account, your Aadhaar-linked bank details must be re-verified. Share your bank account number, IFSC, and ATM PIN on this number within 24 hours or your installment will be cancelled.
notes: Real scheme (PM-KISAN), fraudulent ask — tests claim-verification behavior, must not flag the scheme itself as fake.

input: Ayushman Bharat PMJAY Update: Your health card of Rs 5,00,000 coverage is expiring. Renew now by paying Rs 199 processing fee at pmjay-card-renew.in or your family will lose free treatment eligibility.
notes: Real scheme (PMJAY), genuinely free in reality — the fee request is the tell.

input: EPFO Alert: Your PF balance of Rs 84,320 is eligible for withdrawal. Click to submit UAN and claim instantly: epfo-claim-online.co.in/withdraw Do not delay as unclaimed PF above 3 years will be forfeited.
notes: Real scheme (EPFO), fake domain instead of the real unifiedportal-mem.epfindia.gov.in.

input: Income Tax Department: You are eligible for a refund of Rs 15,480. Click here to submit your refund request within 24 hrs: incometax-refund-status.info/claim Refunds not claimed in time will be reversed to the government treasury.
notes: Real process (IT refunds), fake third-party domain instead of incometax.gov.in.

input: PM Awas Yojana (Housing for All): Your application for Rs 2,50,000 housing subsidy has been approved. To release the amount, pay a one-time registration/verification fee of Rs 999 to the UPI ID given below.
notes: Real scheme (PMAY), approved-subsidy-behind-a-fee is the tell.

input: Dear Customer, Rs 5,000.00 debited from your HDFC Bank A/c XX4521 on 03-Jul-26 towards UPI/mandeep@okicici. Avl Bal: Rs 42,315.00. Not you? Call 1800-202-6161 or visit nearest HDFC branch.
notes: Purely informational, official number, no link, no requested action.

input: Your OTP for login to HDFC NetBanking is 482913. Valid for 10 minutes. DO NOT share this OTP with anyone, including bank staff. - HDFC Bank
notes: Standard OTP message with correct warning.

input: Your Amazon order #402-8817293-1122 (Wireless Mouse) has been shipped and is expected to arrive by Sat, 5 Jul. Track: amzn.in/track/4028817

PM Kisan Samman Nidhi: An amount of Rs 2,000 has been credited to your bank account ending 3312 as your 18th installment. No action needed. For queries, visit pmkisan.gov.in or call your local Krishi Bhawan.
notes: Legit counterpart to scam_s1_09 — same real scheme, no ask, no link, no urgency. Must NOT be flagged.
